name: Iron Accord
summary: The institutional body behind Roaz fortifications, strategic facilities, and controlled antimagic engineering.
day_to_day: Plans works, deploys crews, protects designs, and oversees strategic build priorities.
who_works_there: Architects, engineers, masons, ward specialists, military logisticians.
who_uses_it: Roaz military command, ORE, border installations, civilian works requiring approval.
authority: Can requisition materials, secure worksites, and restrict access to sensitive projects.
public_manifestation: Fortification crews, closed corridors, guarded plans, and visible strategic construction.
conflict_or_bottleneck: Military urgency can starve civilian infrastructure and deepen popular resentment.
